tasks.subject: Task 1: Add hidden field, findAllVisible, and auto-install filter in ApplicationsService
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Type-level support for the flag, a tenant-aware visibility filter on the service, and an updated auto-install filter. Mark openclaw as hidden.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/application.types.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/applications.service.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/applications.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @team9/gateway test -- --testPathPattern 'applications.service.spec'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/application.types.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/applications.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/applications.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @team9/gateway test -- --testPathPattern 'applications.service.spec'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Application type has optional hidden?: boolean", "openclaw entry marked hidden: true", "findAllVisible(installedIds) filters hidden apps not in the set", "findAll unchanged, still returns all enabled apps", "findById still returns hidden apps", "findAutoInstall excludes hidden", "Unit tests cover all new paths"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Make ApplicationsController tenant-aware
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /v1/applications and GET /v1/applications/:id respect the hidden flag per tenant via WorkspaceGuard + CurrentTenantId.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/applications.controller.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/applications.controller.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @team9/gateway test -- --testPathPattern 'applications.controller.spec'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/applications.controller.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/applications.controller.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @team9/gateway test -- --testPathPattern 'applications.controller.spec'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Controller uses AuthGuard + WorkspaceGuard", "InstalledApplicationsService injected", "findAll resolves tenant, builds installedIds, calls findAllVisible", "findById 404s for hidden apps the tenant has not installed", "Tests cover all branches"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Reject new installs of hidden apps in InstalledApplicationsService.install
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Direct install of a hidden applicationId rejected with ForbiddenException before any DB write.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/installed-applications.service.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/installed-applications.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @team9/gateway test -- --testPathPattern 'installed-applications.service.spec'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/installed-applications.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/installed-applications.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @team9/gateway test -- --testPathPattern 'installed-applications.service.spec'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["install() throws ForbiddenException when hidden", "No db.insert or onInstall called on hidden path", "Existing install paths not regressed", "Uninstall of hidden app still works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Full-module verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the whole applications module stays green and the gateway compiles.

**Files:** none (verification only; inline fixups allowed)

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @team9/gateway test -- --testPathPattern applications && pnpm build:server

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @team9/gateway test -- --testPathPattern applications && pnpm build:server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["applications module tests green", "pnpm build:server succeeds", "No new TS errors"]}
```
